name: openclaw-desktop
description: OpenClaw Desktop — OpenClaw 桌面客户端，连接 OpenClaw Gateway
author: Wei ZHANG

scripts.dev: npm run sync:edition && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node scripts/build-electron.js && electron . --enable-logging"
scripts.build: npm run sync:edition && npm run generate:provider-catalog && node scripts/build-electron.js && vite build
scripts.build:mac: bash -c 'ulimit -n 65536 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; if [ -f .env.apple ]; then source .env.apple; fi; npm run build && ./node_modules/.bin/electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64 && ./node_modules/.bin/electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64'
scripts.build:mac:lite: bash -c 'ulimit -n 65536 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; if [ -f .env.apple ]; then source .env.apple; fi; npm run build && ARCH=$(node -p "process.arch === \"arm64\" ? \"arm64\" : \"x64\"") && ./node_modules/.bin/electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch $ARCH && electron-builder --mac dmg --$ARCH --publish never'
scripts.build:mac:lite:arm64: bash -c 'ulimit -n 65536 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; if [ -f .env.apple ]; then source .env.apple; fi; npm run build && ./node_modules/.bin/electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch arm64 && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never'
scripts.build:mac:lite:x64: bash -c 'ulimit -n 65536 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; if [ -f .env.apple ]; then source .env.apple; fi; npm run build && ./node_modules/.bin/electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch x64 && electron-builder --mac dmg --x64 --publish never'
scripts.build:win:lite: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never -c.nsis.differentialPackage=false -c.generateUpdatesFilesForAllChannels=false
scripts.package:mac: bash -c 'ulimit -n 65536 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; if [ -f .env.apple ]; then source .env.apple; fi; npm run build && ./node_modules/.bin/electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64 && ./node_modules/.bin/electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64'
